contexts: "delete from mean_values where companyid='"+context.companyid+"' and datasetgroup=3"

"SELECT
ROUND(AVG(P1),2) as 'Mean Total Visits to Website',
ROUND(AVG(P1)+3*STDDEV(P1),2) as 'MAX Total Visits to Website',

ROUND(AVG(P2),2) as 'Mean Total Page Views',
ROUND(AVG(P2)+3*STDDEV(P2),2) as 'MAX Total Page Views',

ROUND(AVG(P2/IF(P1=0,1,P1)),2) AS 'Mean Page Views per Visit',
ROUND(AVG(P2/IF(P1=0,1,P1))+3*STDDEV(P2/IF(P1=0,1,P1)),2)  AS 'MAX Page Views per Visit',

ROUND(AVG(P4),2) AS 'Mean Total Time on all Pages',
ROUND(AVG(P4)+3*STDDEV(P4),2) AS 'MAX Total Time on all Pages',

ROUND(AVG(P4/IF(P1=0,1,P1)),2)  AS 'Mean Avg Visit Duration',
ROUND(AVG(P4/IF(P1=0,1,P1))+3* STDDEV(P4/IF(P1=0,1,P1)),2) AS 'MAX Avg Visit Duration',

ROUND(AVG(P6),2) AS 'AVG Bounce Rate',
ROUND(AVG(P6)+3*STDDEV(P6),2) AS 'MAX Bounce Rate',

ROUND(AVG(P7),2) AS 'AVG Checkout Abandonment Rate',
ROUND(AVG(P7)+3*STDDEV(P7),2) AS 'MAX Checkout Abandonment Rate',

ROUND(AVG(P15-P19),2)  AS 'Mean Total Repeat Users',
ROUND(AVG(P15-P19)+3*STDDEV(P15-P19),2)  AS 'MAX Total Repeat Users',

ROUND(AVG(P19/IF(P15-P19=0 ,1 ,P15-P19)),2) AS 'Mean New Vs Returned Visitors',
ROUND(AVG(P19/IF(P15-P19=0 ,1 ,P15-P19))+3*STDDEV(P19/IF(P15-P19=0 ,1 ,P15-P19)),2) AS 'MAX New Vs Returned Visitors',

ROUND(AVG(P10),2) AS 'Mean Page Exits',
ROUND(AVG(P10)+3*STDDEV(P10),2) AS 'MAX Page Exits',

ROUND(AVG(P11),2) AS 'AVG Task Completion Rate',
ROUND(AVG(P11)+3*STDDEV(P11),2) AS 'MAX Task Completion Rate',

ROUND(AVG(P12),2) AS 'Mean Percent Visitors who view product pages',
ROUND(AVG(P12)+3*STDDEV(P12),2) AS 'MAX Percent Visitors who view product pages',

ROUND(AVG(P13),2) AS 'Mean Total Page Load Time',
ROUND(AVG(P13)+3*STDDEV(P13),2) AS 'MAX Total Page Load Time',

ROUND(AVG(P1/P15),2)  AS 'Mean Visits Per User',
ROUND(AVG(P1/P15)+3*STDDEV(P1/P15),2)  AS 'MAX Visits Per User',

ROUND(AVG(P15),2) AS 'Mean Total Visitors',
ROUND(AVG(P15)+3*STDDEV(P15),2) AS 'MAX Total Visitors',

ROUND(AVG(P4/P2),2)  AS 'Mean Avg. Time On Page',
ROUND(AVG(P4/P2)+3*STDDEV(P4/P2),2)  AS 'MAX Avg. Time On Page',

ROUND(AVG((P15-P19)/P15*100),2) AS 'AVG Visitor Loyalty',
ROUND(AVG((P15-P19)/P15*100)+3*STDDEV((P15-P19)/P19*100),2) AS 'MAX Visitor Loyalty',

ROUND(AVG(P18),2) AS 'Mean Percent of people who search on your site',
ROUND(AVG(P18)+3*STDDEV(P18),2) AS 'MAX Percent of people who search on your site',

ROUND(AVG(P19),2) AS 'Mean Total New Users',
ROUND(AVG(P19)+3*STDDEV(P19),2) AS 'MAX Total New Users'

FROM
(
SELECT
dates,hours,
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='1' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P1',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='2' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P2',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='3' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P3',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='4' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P4',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='5' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P5',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='6' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P6',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='7' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P7',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='8' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P8',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='9' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P9',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='10' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P10',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='11' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P11',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='12' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P12',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='13' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P13',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='14' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P14',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='15' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P15',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='16' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P16',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='17' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P17',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='18' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P18',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='19' THEN paramvalues ELSE 0 END) AS 'P19'
FROM
(
 select companyid,dates,hours,paramid, paramvalues
 FROM ga_master_data
 WHERE companyid = '"+context.companyid+"' AND DATES BETWEEN '"+context.startdate+"' AND '"+context.enddate+"'
 ORDER BY dates,hours,paramid ASC
) s
GROUP BY dates,hours)AA;"
"delete from mean_values where companyid='"+context.companyid+"' and datasetgroup=2"

"SELECT
AA.companyid,
ROUND(AVG(P1),2) AS 'Mean Total Visits to Website',
ROUND(AVG(P1)+3*STDDEV(P1),2) AS 'MAX Total Visits to Website',

ROUND(AVG(P2),2) AS 'Mean Total Page Views',
ROUND(AVG(P2)+3*STDDEV(P2),2) AS 'MAX Total Page Views',

ROUND(AVG(P2/P1),2) AS 'Mean Page Views Per Visit',
ROUND(AVG(P2/P1)+3*(STDDEV(P2/P1)),2)AS 'MAX Page Views Per Visit',

ROUND(AVG(P4),2) AS 'Mean Time On Page',
ROUND(AVG(P4)+3*STDDEV(P4),2) AS 'MAX Time On Page',

ROUND(AVG(P4/P1),2) AS 'Mean Total Time Spent Per Session',
ROUND(AVG(P4/P1)+3*STDDEV(P4/P1),2) AS 'MAX Total Time Spent Per Session',

ROUND(AVG((P6/P1)*100),2) AS 'AVG Bounce Rate',
ROUND(AVG((P6/P1)*100)+3*STDDEV((P6/P1)*100),2)AS 'MAX Bounce Rate',

ROUND(AVG((P7/P1)*100),2) AS 'AVG Checkout Abandonment Rate',
ROUND(AVG((P7/P1)*100)+3*STDDEV((P7/P1)*100),2) AS 'MAX Checkout Abandonment Rate',

ROUND(AVG((P8/P1)*100),2) AS 'AVG Task Completion Rate',
ROUND(AVG((P8/P1)*100)+3*STDDEV((P8/P1)*100),2) AS 'MAX Task Completion Rate',

ROUND(AVG(P9),2) AS 'Mean Number of Clickable events',
ROUND(AVG(P9)+3*STDDEV(P9),2) AS 'MAX Number of Clickable events',

ROUND(AVG(P10),2) AS 'Mean Number Of Product Pages Viewed',
ROUND(AVG(P10)+3*STDDEV(P10),2) AS 'MAX Number Of Product Pages Viewed',

ROUND(AVG(P11),2) AS 'Mean Page Load Per Refresh Time',
ROUND(AVG(P11)+3*STDDEV(P11),2) AS 'MAX Page Load Per Refresh Time',

ROUND(AVG(P4/P2 ),2) AS 'Mean Avg Page Time',
ROUND(AVG(P4/P2 )+3*STDDEV(P4/P2 ),2) AS 'MAX Avg Page Time',

ROUND(AVG(P13),2) AS 'Mean Number of scrolls per session',
ROUND(AVG(P13)+3*STDDEV(P13)) AS 'MAX Number of scrolls per session',

ROUND(AVG(P14)) AS 'Mean Search',
ROUND(AVG(P14)+3*STDDEV(P14),2) AS 'MAX Search',

ROUND(AVG((P1/TOT)*100),2) AS 'AVG Visitor Loyalty',
ROUND(AVG(P1/TOT*100)+3*STDDEV(P1/TOT*100),2) AS 'MAX Visitor Loyalty',

ROUND(AVG(P16),2) AS 'Mean Top Exit Pages',
ROUND(AVG(P16)+3*STDDEV(P16),2) AS 'MAX Top Exit Pages'

FROM
(
SELECT
'1' AS ID,s.companyid,
cookiename,
Count(distinct(sessionid)) AS 'P1',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='2' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P2',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='3' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P3',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='4' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P4',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='5' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P5',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='6' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P6',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='7' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P7',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='8' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P8',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='9' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P9',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='10' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P10',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='11' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P11',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='12' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P12',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='13' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P13',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='14' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P14',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='15' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P15',
SUM( CASE WHEN paramid='16' THEN paramvalue ELSE 0 END) AS 'P16',
A.SumCookies AS 'TOT'
FROM
(
 select sessionid,companyid,cookiename,paramid, paramvalue
 FROM plugin_master_data
 WHERE companyid ='"+context.companyid+"' AND sessiontimestamp BETWEEN '"+context.startdate+"' AND '"+context.enddate+"'
 ORDER BY cookiename,paramid ASC
) s,(select companyid,COUNT(cookiename) as SumCookies FROM plugin_master_data
WHERE companyid = '"+context.companyid+"' and paramid=2 AND sessiontimestamp BETWEEN  '"+context.startdate+"' AND '"+context.enddate+"'
GROUP BY companyid) A
WHERE s.companyid=A.companyid
GROUP BY cookiename) AA
GROUP BY companyid;"
"DELETE from mean_values where companyid='"+context.companyid+"' and datasetgroup in (2,3);"
